3133440.name: Rescue
3133440.description:
Rescue is a sometimes lighthearted and sometimes dark, supernatural thriller with an occasional splash of comic relief. Strange events seem to be drawn to your home town and Evil is not always easy to recognize as you journey through this action-RPG 3rd person shooter.

A quick moment in time changes your life forever when you rescue a seemingly normal dog in danger. As you learn that this dog is far more than she seems, you realize she is vital to your survival and you to hers. To survive, you and your dog must embark on a journey to rescue a dead man & enter a place more terrifying than Hell.

As the reluctant hero, you are blessed – or cursed – with a paranormal talent you don’t understand & can’t control. So, it’s not in your cards to lead the normal life you desire. It’s hard to be normal while an unrelenting evil enemy hunts you and strange events seem to target you.

Battle hordes of demonic creatures, supernatural entities, monsters, undead armies, and more.

Rescue innocent victims whose souls are destined for a fate worse than death.

Escape the shadow of evil cast by the relentless enemy that hunts you and your dog, a powerful sadistic demon with an insatiable appetite for innocent souls.

Survive your family's dark secrets and the curse that overshadows your hometown.

Remember - the worst evil - does not always wear a monster's face!
3133440.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
